SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-23-2025 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO NOV-04-2025 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT FAILED TO PRODUCE THE CAMERA FOOTAGE (BODY CAM) AND THE LOG BOOK. DEFENDANT CLAIMED THAT THE SUBPOENAED ITEMS DID NOT SPECIFY CLEARLY WHETHER LOG BOOK IS FROM CJ1, CJ2 OR CJ3?. HOWEVER, IT WAS CLARIFIED IN COURT THAT LOG BOOK REFERRED TO IN THE SUBPOENA IS THE ONE FROM CJ1. DEFENDANT GOT ALL INFORMATION NEEDED TO PRODUCE THE ITEMS ON THE NEXT HEARING DATE. BY VISITING JUDGE HARRY JACOBS. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF ERICK FERNANDO GARCIA-PINEDA IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT APPEARING ON ITS BEHALF IS GRACE GLENN. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED (D506)
ORDER FOR CONTINUANCE RE: TO BRING SUBPOENAED ITEMS

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE BY VISITING JUDGE JOSH FREDRICKS. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF ERICK FERNANDO GARCIA-PINEDA IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT. GRACE M. GLENN IS APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER FOR DISMISSAL W/O PREJUDICE
